active_task_summaries.title: Land docs and governance reconciliation tranche

recent_closed_initiatives.title: Pack CLI Fault Isolation Hardening
recent_closed_initiatives.closure_reason: Delivered and validated host CLI fault isolation hardening for broken hosted-pack integrations.

recent_closed_initiatives.title: Ledger Retirement Contract Change
recent_closed_initiatives.closure_reason: Retired the live ledger surface family in favor of retained records, updated contracts and governed artifacts, and validated the repository end to end.

recent_closed_initiatives.title: Pack Bootstrap Installation Contract
recent_closed_initiatives.closure_reason: Delivered guarded pack bootstrap registration flow and validated shared workspace wiring.

recent_closed_initiatives.title: Hosted Pack Parity, Scaffolding, and Plan Runtime Flattening
recent_closed_initiatives.closure_reason: Aligned WatchTowerOversight to the host layer, shipped hosted-pack scaffolding, flattened plan workspace services into a feature-owned package, and validated the tranche.

recent_closed_initiatives.title: Pack Starter Templates And Oversight Alignment
recent_closed_initiatives.closure_reason: Published hosted-pack starter templates, aligned WatchTowerOversight to the shared runtime-manifest contract, and validated adoption across both repositories.

recent_closed_initiatives.title: Domain Pack Externalization and Portability Proof
recent_closed_initiatives.closure_reason: Validated the portable pack capsule contract, proved plan and second-pack externalization, and published externalized pack authoring guidance.

recent_closed_initiatives.title: Core Host Pack Architecture Hard Cutover
recent_closed_initiatives.closure_reason: Delivered the core-host-pack boundary split, namespaced host CLI, pack contracts, validation guards, and closeout cleanup.

recent_closed_initiatives.title: Plan Python Package Dependency Cleanup
recent_closed_initiatives.closure_reason: Installed watchtower_plan through the shared workspace, removed repo-local path bootstrapping, and validated the final boundary split.

recent_closed_initiatives.title: Pack Domain Hardcoding Remediation
recent_closed_initiatives.closure_reason: Removed remaining pack-domain hardcoding from reusable core, moved plan-domain runtime under plan/python, and validated the pack-driven endstate.

recent_closed_initiatives.title: Requirements And Decisions Adherence Remediation
recent_closed_initiatives.closure_reason: Retired root docs, completed the initiative-package hard cutover, restored rich rendered surfaces, and validated the repository.
